overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, exploring a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player moves through industrial underpasses, elevated walkways, and neon-lit commercial streets before reaching a busy intersection with towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with steam vents and graffiti

events.description: NPC character runs toward camera from the distance and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dark industrial underpass toward the light at the end

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing running urgently toward and past the camera, exiting left

entered.detail: large structural support column with weathered surface
wall covered in blue and white spray paint tags
thick cables and pipes running across the ceiling
ground-level vent emitting white steam across the walkway
horizontal metal bars along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial underpass with concrete pillars and graffiti-covered walls. Steam rises from a floor vent as the player walks forward. At approximately 3.5 seconds, an NPC character runs urgently toward the camera from the distant exit and passes by on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional stairwell and corridor leading to surface

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs from the underpass
approaching bright exit portal, lighting shifts from artificial to intense natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and moving through a corridor with advertisements on the walls

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal edges leading upward
illuminated poster frames showing product advertisements
narrow horizontal windows showing glimpses of the city outside
intensely bright opening at the end of the corridor indicating outdoor exit

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a concrete stairwell from the underpass into a transitional corridor. The walls feature illuminated advertisements and narrow windows. As the player approaches the exit around 14 seconds, the lighting shifts dramatically from dim artificial to intense natural sunlight streaming through the portal ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated outdoor walkway with city skyline views

events.description: exits covered corridor into bright sunlit elevated walkway with panoramic city views
turns right to re-enter covered structure

agents.ego_description: stepping out onto a sunlit elevated platform, briefly admiring the futuristic skyline before turning right

entered.detail: towering skyscrapers with glass facades and neon accents visible in the distance
smooth white safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
multi-level external staircase attached to adjacent building
large rotating advertisement screen on distant building

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor onto a bright sunlit elevated walkway with panoramic views of the futuristic city skyline. The scene is briefly open to the sky before the player turns right at 18 seconds to re-enter a covered structure. White railings line the walkway edge, and digital billboards are visible on distant towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with street views and descending stairs

events.description: begins descending stairs toward street level
exits covered walkway onto street level in Asian-inspired commercial district

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered walkway, looking down at the street below, then descending stairs to ground level

entered.detail: concrete walkway with overhead beams providing partial cover
open side of walkway revealing the street level below
concrete stairs leading down to street level with metal handrails
electrical panels and conduits mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a covered elevated walkway with open sides revealing the street below. The environment features concrete construction with utility boxes and overhead lighting. At 25 seconds, the player begins descending stairs, exiting the covered structure at 28 seconds to reach street level in a commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: Asian-inspired commercial street with neon signs and traditional gate

events.description: passing through red torii gate into traditional Japanese-themed shopping street

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow commercial street, observing shop fronts and neon signage

notable_agents.action: woman in green shirt standing at food stall, gesturing with her hands

entered.detail: traditional Japanese red gate marking entrance to the shopping district
string of red spherical lanterns hanging across the street
yellow and black vertical sign for pawn shop
illuminated sign for 'the Amb' establishment
circular neon sign with Japanese text for optical shop

segments.scene_description: The player enters a vibrant Asian-inspired commercial street marked by a red torii gate. The narrow street is lined with shops including the El Dorado Pawn Shop, illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs. A woman in a green shirt stands near a food stall on the right. The atmosphere mixes traditional Japanese architectural elements with futuristic cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection beneath overpass with heavy commercial towers

events.description: emerging from narrow street into wide open intersection with multi-lane traffic
vehicles moving through the intersection, traffic flowing in both directions

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking along the edge of a busy intersection, observing the traffic and towering billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and crosswalk markings
elevated highway structure casting shadows over the street
tall building covered in large video screens displaying advertisements
tall palm trees planted in the median of the boulevard
yellow-painted elevated roadway with support columns

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow commercial street into a wide urban intersection beneath an elevated highway. The scene opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards, palm trees lining the median, and moderate vehicle traffic moving through the intersection. The architecture shifts from intimate traditional storefronts to imposing modern commercial towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim industrial underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. It begins in a concrete underpass filled with graffiti and rising steam, where an urgent NPC dashes past as the camera moves forward. The scene then ascends a stairwell into a transitional corridor of illuminated ads, where the dim artificial light shifts dramatically into intense natural sunlight upon emerging onto an elevated walkway with panoramic skyline views. As the camera turns and descends from this covered structure, it transitions from the open heights down to street level, entering a narrow commercial district marked by a red torii gate, paper lanterns, and traditional storefronts. Finally, the intimate street opens up into a wide urban intersection beneath an elevated highway, where the architecture shifts from small shops to imposing skyscrapers draped in massive digital billboards.
